Uses of Package
io.foldright.inspectablewrappers

Packages that use io.foldright.inspectablewrappers
Package
Description
io.foldright.inspectablewrappers
🪐 Inspectable Wrappers Specification provides a standard for wrapper chain with the inspection ability.
io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils
Utils classes for inspectable wrappers.
  • Classes in io.foldright.inspectablewrappers used by io.foldright.inspectablewrappers
    Class
    Description
    Wrapper
    This Wrapper interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, make wrapper instances as an inspectable wrapper chain(linked list).
  • Classes in io.foldright.inspectablewrappers used by io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils
    Class
    Description
    Attachable
    This Attachable interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, provide the attachment storage ability.
